hero.sectionName: Kavya & Mihir – Royal Gujarati Christian Wedding Hero
hero.html:
ॐ શ્રી ગણેશ કૃપા

પ્રભુ ઈસુ ખ્રિસ્ત અને ઈશ્વરના આશીર્વાદ સાથે

Bride Kavya
&
Groom Mihir
✦
The Wedding Celebration March 22, 2026 ૨૨ માર્ચ ૨૦૨૬
🏛
Akshar Grand Palace Somerset, New Jersey

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

મહેંદી · ગરબા · બારાત · ફેરા · સ્નેહ
Accept Your Invitation →
✿ ✾ ✿ ✾ ✿ ✾ ✿ ✾ ✿ ✾ ✿ ✾ ✿ ✾ ✿ ✾
hero.designNotes: Royal Gujarati palace aesthetic rendered as a full-screen luxury landing hero. The deep jewel-tone background (midnight plum + crimson + indigo) evokes a royal durbar, layered with a subtle brocade lattice pattern. A hand-painted toran strip of CSS leaf pendants crowns the top, and a marigold flower band anchors the bottom — both cultural Gujarati motifs. Floating amber diya SVGs flicker via CSS animation on either side. Corner mandala SVG ornaments frame the composition. The centrepiece is an asymmetric glass-morphism panel with gradient borders and backdrop-blur, housing a stacked typographic hierarchy: Cormorant Garamond for the grand italic names, Rozha One for the gold ampersand, Playfair Display for the date, and Noto Serif Gujarati for the badge, Gujarati subtitle, date translation, and event pills. Animated floating orbs add depth. The gold CTA button uses a metallic gradient with a hover lift effect. All animations are CSS-only. Fully responsive at 900px and 640px breakpoints, collapsing the name layout vertically and hiding decorative side elements on small screens.
